reviews.review_description: The story line is beautiful it reminds me of a story book the Caterpillar and the interaction with Luna is fun. I love it
Super relaxing, lovely colors and music/sounds…
This is a relaxing zen like game/story. I didn’t want it to end. It was so beautiful too. Hopefully they will make more games like this one.

First off I'd like to say that I appreciate the addition of a Dutch language translation in this game.
However I do wonder why the developers didn't bother to hire a Dutch voice over as well to narrate the story.
Sadly it seems that fixing that ain’t a priority to the developers in the slightest. Pretty pathetic if you ask me.

I downloaded this several days before I played it.
I work in Healthcare and my empathy was waning. On a whim I opened Luna and started to follow the story. It restored my empathy and I found it completely enchanting. 
Even though I went through the whole thing, I will return to Luna again. A wonderful story, well told and well presented.

I enjoyed the game until the end ( I assume) where I have to trace a circle around the moon to move on. It is stuck there & I can’t figure out what to do to get past it. It feels broken because what you are supposed to do is pretty obvious & it doesn’t work. I hope it can be fixed because I otherwise really enjoyed it.

This is very sweet and relaxing. After finishing the 1st puzzle/story, I was thrilled to see more waiting to be opened. It’s nice when you can pop in and chill for a little bit and there’s a perfect stopping point to come back in later.
I loved this game.  It’s like a cross between a game and meditation.  The graphics are beautiful, and the voice is soothing.  Yes, it’s very simple, but has a lovely story, and I enjoyed playing.

reviews.review_title: Best way to end the day
reviews.review_description:
This is not a game to"win" it's a great way to relax and wind down the day.  The story is meant to give some context. You move from one chapter of the store to the next. Each chapter begins with mimicking some easy notes by playing the same notes as the bird who you are following through all the chapters. You then will need to play a three-dimensional game of moving stars to match their missing spot in the constellations. Once you have gone through these two steps five or six times a new scene opens up that you decorate with the plants and animals of the constellations you made. You can change the color and choose the placement for the plants and animals. Once that is done the scene comes to life and interacts with the bird and then you are going on to the next chapter.
I found it very relaxing to play. It's not something that you need to rush through to see how fast you can get through it and win. This is where I go after I'm done playing for the day and I need to relax and to calm down and be ready for the evening. I find it very Zen, and one chapter at night is all I do. I'm  on my second playthrough, and it's just relaxing as the first time.
Luna is a peaceful and beautiful story. Poetic at its core, relaxing, with non-challenging interactions. A worthwhile short experience for the whole family.

Firstly and most importantly, Luna is very beautiful and has a wonderful atmosphere of self belief and acceptance. However, it is very simplistic, I think children would get more out of it than adults. It reminds me very much of the CBeebies childrens stories my kids used to watch, In the Night Garden and stuff like that. So as an adult I feel impatient with the message and its slow paced delivery.  Now I agree that the world can always do with more peace and love and all, its just when you grow up you realise that what you see as peace, is someone else's loss, that it is impossible to please everyone, and life is incredibly complicated. So boiling it down to cute stories that give easy solutions is really only suitable for very young children who need to feel secure.
So its great that there is this lovely experience for them on VR! I totally recommend this for young children, which I feel are a neglected area for VR, since interactive stories are exactly the kind of thing they love, based on my experience working with very young children. But I feel that as an adult you need to read some real philosophy and stop looking for easy solutions that make you feel good without actually doing good.

This is such a hidden gem! At the time of my writing, this game has just 28 reviews - how is that possible?
The graphics are beautiful, the narrator is perfect and the experience itself is just amazing!
The game is something between a puzzle game and an interactive story.
Just buy it, it’s great!
I absolutely love  this little game 💖  So lovely and sweet !

ORIGINAL REVIEW ... 5 stars
Loving this fable. The graphics and music are awesome. Looking forward to each step of the journey meeting new creatures,  restoring their worlds, and watching the moon change from new to full. 
UPDATED REVIEW ... 3 stars
Unfortunately changing my review from 5 stars to 3 stars. Completed the first constellation puzzle in the second world. The light traveled around and the music played, but the yellow image never appeared. Playing on Quest 2, so game should work.
HELP PLEASE
Cannot find contact email for the developer. Tried deleting the saved data from the cloud -and- uninstalling/reinstalling the game. Still unable to play. Hoping someone can help with this.

This was beautiful, I loved the artistic style, the music. This isn't meant to be a challenging puzzle game. It's a relaxing sweet story, it's category is lierally meditation and relaxation... Great game for when u want to VR before bed but don't want to do anything vigorous. Also could be a good one for the younger ones to watch your cast to TV while you do it. It isn't meant to be rushed through and conquered, it is meant to be enjoyed and savored. I love this one.

reviews.review_title: Too expensive for what it is
reviews.review_description: It’s cute. The graphics are great - nothing mind blowing. But I finished 2 of the 6 levels in 15mins with zero challenge. This isn’t so much a game as more of an interactive story. Which awesome - I love those: think Baba Yaga, paper birds, wolves in the walls with a bit more interaction but at $15 the cost is too high IMO. I think the sweet spot is $8.99 so I think I’ll be returning it unfortunately. I’d gladly keep it at the later price but for $15 I can get much more from other games/apps. Sorry devs. I hate to leave a bad review but your pricing is what warranted me writing one. I couldn’t let myself get into the story because I was focused on the fact that I paid $15 for this experience.
Can’t get past the second levels star puzzles . When you finish the puzzle the little yellow image doesn’t appear to fill out the constellation
A relaxing, beautiful story, great to end the day with. Children would love it, I expected a little more from it.
y’all what’s ur problem like this game is so cute and amazing why the hell u dishin’ it because of its price

My daughter loved this game until the last level, when you're supposed to draw a circle around the moon.. It's here that the game totally glitches and won't let her complete it. Very frustrating for a game that is supposed to be relaxing. :(
